title: Hujr b.'Adi's execution
description: Hisham b. Muhammad-Abu Mikhnaf-al-Mujalid b. Said, al-Saq'ab b. Zuhayr, Fudayl b. Khadij, and al-Husayn b. 'Ugbah al-Maradi have all told me some of this narrative, so their account was combined with what I transmitted of the narrative about Hujr b. 'Adi al-Kindi and his companions: When Mu'awiyah b. Abi Sufyan put al-Mughirah b. Shu'bah in charge of alKiifah in Jumada 41 (September 2-October 30, 661), he summoned him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
